systemStatus.headline: Fri May 22 4 AM run - feeds run 1-2 days behind at 4 AM (before the ~7:40 AM email drop). Latest Toast = Wed May 20 DPS (Thu May 21 not yet emailed). Latest Sling = Thu May 21 schedule (Fri May 22 not yet emailed). Google Ads = email-only check (2 report emails, no disapprovals). No new Yelp/TripAdvisor actionable email. GitHub PAT 200 OK.
systemStatus.detail: (1) Toast: freshest DPS is Wed May 20 (arrived Thu May 21 7:38 AM PT) - Net $5,442.45, Gross $5,542.95, ~211 guests / ~120 checks (counts DERIVED from avg-check division; verify in Toast), voids $74.00, discounts $100.50, refunds $0, labor 17.5% ($951.15). Up +24.6% net vs same day last week (Wed May 13 Net $4,368.05). Thu May 21 DPS NOT arrived at 4 AM. (2) Sling: freshest report is Thu May 21 (7:02 AM PT) - 8 employees, 38.74 hrs, 0 OT, 0 uncovered, 1 off. Fri May 22 report not yet emailed at 4 AM. (3) Google Ads: email-only check; 2 report emails in 24h, no disapprovals/budget alerts; live metrics carried from May 19 scrape. (4) Yelp: only a marketing blast in 24h. (5) TripAdvisor: no new email in 24h (last was May 20 teaser). (6) GitHub PAT: 200 OK.
